item.title: First RSS Article
item.author: writer@example.com (RSS Writer)
item.content:encoded:
This RSS fixture includes full article content so the reader can store a useful local copy without fetching the original page. The paragraph is deliberately long enough to exercise the normal article path and to make search indexing meaningful for future tests.

The sync service should prefer content encoded over the shorter description, preserve the source URL, and keep the guid stable across repeated synchronizations.

item.title: Second RSS Article
item.description: This item has no explicit guid, so the link is the stable identity. It is intentionally short enough to be treated as a summary-style feed entry.
